name: cc-worker
description: cc-worker — the project's second pilot: hand /worker any piece of work (a fix, a change, a feature, a question) and it adapts to the request, reading the goal (roadmap.md) and design (architecture) and reaching for the right cc-tools and cc-pipeline skills to carry it out. Ships as BOTH a skill (invoke /worker in the conversation, or the model routes to it) AND a native subagent (delegate a whole task to a worker that runs in its own context). Three invariants: it keeps the roadmap true (reflects intended work, marks done what it finishes), it changes architecture only through cc-pipeline:architect first, and it obeys the flags (--auto, --fast, --worktree, --ultracode — how, never what). Depends on cc-pipeline and cc-tools.
